description_long: This is a classic chest of drawers with a smooth, painted finish in a light color, likely white or off-white. The front features three spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate, dark metal handles that contrast elegantly with the body. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the main body, providing a stable area for placing items. Decorative carved patterns are present along the lower front skirt, adding a touch of sophistication. The legs are short and turned, giving the piece a traditional, sturdy appearance. The back is plain with two mounting brackets, and the sides are unadorned, emphasizing the chest's functional yet decorative design.
description: A classic, light-colored chest of drawers with three ornate-handled drawers, decorative carvings, and a smooth, flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with ornate handles and decorative carvings on the lower skirt.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, unadorned panel and the profile of the overhanging top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain back with two mounting brackets and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and the profile of the top.
